title: The Archaeology of Israelite Society in Iron Age II
author: Avraham Faust
allowedUseNotes: Copyrighted monograph. Summaries in project's own words only.
summary: Society-scale archaeology of Iron Age Israel: settlement hierarchy, village and town sizes, population estimation methods, the four-room house and its social reading. Anchor for settlement-scale and house-form claims.
confidenceNotes: Card seeded from team knowledge; page-level citations to be added during the citation verification pass (M1).
